gaming.descriptor: Vertical short-form aspect ratio, center-weighted subject framing with heavily darkened and blurred side panels creating a triptych-style border effect, saturated and punchy color palette dominated by teals, yellows, and electric blues, high-contrast lighting that isolates the central subject against simplified or softened backgrounds, shallow depth of field on foreground elements with midground subjects in sharp focus, energetic and dynamic posed compositions suggesting motion or impact, slightly elevated camera angles on environmental scenes, clean white or neutral backdrops alternating with vivid gradient atmospheres, bold graphic game-UI elements integrated naturally into frame edges, youthful and expressive subject energy conveying surprise or excitement

magazine.descriptor: Vertical portrait-oriented composition with strong center framing, subjects occupying the majority of the frame against contrasting or blurred backgrounds, saturated warm color palette dominated by oranges, reds, and deep blacks, high-contrast dramatic lighting with harsh directional sources creating vivid separation between subject and environment, shallow depth-of-field with background elements softly defocused, cinematic color grading with punchy saturation and crushed shadows, intimate close-to-medium shot distances, bold graphic arrows and visual callouts directing viewer attention, energetic and visceral mood with theatrical staging, split-panel compositional structure flanking a brighter central panel

vlog.descriptor: Vertical portrait-oriented composition with the subject centered or slightly off-center in the middle third, shallow depth of field softly blurring domestic interiors or outdoor rooftop backgrounds, warm and saturated color palette dominated by rich reds, deep blues, and golden ambers, bright natural or practical lighting that casts clean highlights on faces, casual candid energy with expressive facial reactions conveying spontaneity, intimate close proximity framing that fills roughly half the frame with the subject, tiled or everyday household environments providing textural background depth, vibrant high-contrast color grading with punchy saturation, relatable slice-of-life mood with playful informal energy

tech.descriptor: Vertical portrait-format composition with a darkened blurred background panel flanking a bright central subject strip, high-contrast lighting that isolates the focal element against a muted or shadowed surround, saturated accent colors punching against neutral or dark backgrounds, shallow depth-of-field with crisp foreground subjects and soft bokeh reargrounds, split-panel or stacked layout dividing the frame into two distinct visual zones, clinical close-up framing that emphasizes texture and surface detail, bold graphic annotations rendered as geometric shapes in red or white, cool-to-neutral color grading with occasional warm orange or green accent tones, clean product-showcase lighting with hard edge-lit highlights, dynamic diagonal composition lines drawing the eye inward
